prompt: Create a realistic full-body studio fashion portrait of a young East Asian woman with fair skin, long wavy dark brown hair, and straight wispy bangs standing against a plain off-white wall. She faces the camera with a calm, slightly serious expression, hands tucked into her skirt pockets, one leg crossed casually in front of the other. The styling has exactly 7 visible fashion/accessory elements: a cropped black leather biker jacket with silver snaps and zippers, a shiny silver twisted-knot crop top exposing the midriff, a high-waisted gray pleated mini skirt, black lace-up ankle boots, layered silver necklaces including a choker, long dangling earrings, and subtle natural makeup. Use soft daylight from the upper left, clean minimal background, gentle wall shadow to her right, realistic skin texture, sharp focus, vertical 3:4 composition, fashion editorial look, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a realistic full-body studio fashion portrait of a young East Asian woman with fair skin, long wavy dark brown hair, and straight wispy bangs standing against a plain off-white wall. She faces the camera with a calm, slightly serious expression, hands tucked into her skirt pockets, one leg crossed casually in front of the other. The styling has exactly 7 visible fashion/accessory elements: a cropped black leather biker jacket with silver snaps and zippers, a shiny silver twisted-knot crop top exposing the midriff, a high-waisted gray pleated mini skirt, black lace-up ankle boots, layered silver necklaces including a choker, long dangling earrings, and subtle natural makeup. Use soft daylight from the upper left, clean minimal background, gentle wall shadow to her right, realistic skin texture, sharp focus, vertical 3:4 composition, fashion editorial look, no text, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张写实的全身摄影棚时尚人像，主体为 一位皮肤白皙、留着深棕色长波浪卷发和直薄刘海的年轻东亚女性，背景为一面纯净的灰白色墙壁。她面向镜头，表情平静且略带严肃，双手插在裙子口袋里，一条腿随意地交叉在另一条腿前。造型包含 7 个清晰可见的时尚/配饰元素：一件带有银色按扣和拉链的黑色短款皮质机车夹克、一件露出腰部的银色扭结露脐上衣、一条高腰灰色百褶短裙、黑色系带短靴、叠戴的银色项链（含颈圈）、长款吊坠耳环以及精致的自然妆容。使用来自左上方的柔和日光，背景简洁极简，右侧带有柔和的墙面阴影，皮肤纹理真实，焦点清晰，采用 3:4 竖构图，呈现时尚杂志大片质感，无文字，无水印。
